summary: Completed comprehensive code review of 25+ bug fixes in Next.js 16 app with Razorpay billing integration. All security, client-side, server-side, configuration, validation, and error handling fixes verified through static code analysis.
passed_tests: BUG-1: types/billing.ts - Removed process.env references, added getServerRazorpayPlanId() function
BUG-2: app/pricing/page.tsx - Removed 'export const dynamic = force-static'
BUG-3: POST /api/v1/billing - Removed razorpayCustomerId from response
SEC-1: razorpay-client.ts - Implemented timingSafeCompare for HMAC verification
SEC-2: verify/route.ts - Plan derived from subscription.plan_id, not client-sent planId
SEC-3: verify/route.ts - Added rate limiting via checkRateLimit
SEC-4: useBilling.ts - Server count is source of truth, no Math.max merge
SEC-5: webhooks/razorpay/route.ts - Returns 401 for invalid/missing signatures
SEC-6: Webhook handler - Added idempotency check with isEventProcessed/markEventProcessed
SEC-7: GET /api/v1/billing - Removed razorpaySubscriptionId from response
CLI-1: loadRazorpayScript - Added ad blocker/internet connection error message
CLI-2: useBilling - Added isCancelling state, pricing page shows 'Cancelling...'
CLI-3: pricing page - Implemented CancelModal component instead of window.confirm()
CLI-4: ondismiss handler - Added orphaned subscription cleanup
CLI-5: useBilling - Added mountedRef to prevent state updates after unmount
CLI-6: Razorpay checkout - Added prefill with user name and email from Clerk
SRV-1: POST /api/v1/billing - Added Razorpay subscription cancellation if setUserPlan fails
SRV-2: determinePlanFromRazorpayPlan - Defaults to 'free' for unknown plans
SRV-3: verify endpoint - Checks subscription status is 'active' or 'authenticated'
SRV-4: Webhook - Added handlers for subscription.halted and payment.failed events
SRV-5: DELETE /api/v1/billing - Updates cancelAtPeriodEnd in Clerk metadata
CFG-1: wrangler.toml - Removed DODO references, contains only RAZORPAY references
CFG-2: lib/server/env.ts - Added all required RAZORPAY environment variables
CFG-3: tier-checker.ts - setUserPlan stores cancelAtPeriodEnd in Clerk metadata
VAL-1: billing-schemas.ts - Added regex validation for Razorpay ID formats
VAL-2: billing-schemas.ts - Added max length limits on email and ID fields
ERR-1: POST /api/v1/billing - Error responses exclude internal Razorpay details
ERR-2: razorpay-client.ts - Added parseRazorpayError function for API error parsing
